MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-24-2011 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Reponse To Pltf'S Req. For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admission Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORPORRATION'S MOTION For Order Compelling Reponse To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admission Admitted And For Sanctions is Off calendar for failure to provide Department 301 with endorsed-filed Courtesy Copies of the moving papers per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6(b) and per this court's 4/29/11 order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Reponse To Pltf'S Req. For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admission Admitted And For Sanctions

MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP.'s Motion For Order Compelling Response To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admission Admitted And For Sanctions is continued to May 9, 2011 for moving party to provide Dept. 301 with endoresed filed courtesy copies of the moving papers per Local Rule 2.6(b) by May 2, 2011.
